content:
## Customer Use
Same-day ACH transfer is the transfer option for customers who need ACH delivery completed on the submission business day. Use the transfer type value ach_same_day when matching this product in back-office references, but use the customer-facing name Same-day ACH transfer in explanations.

## Pricing and Limits
- Transfer fee: 2 per submitted Same-day ACH transfer.
- Per-transfer cap: 100000. Do not quote or submit a single Same-day ACH transfer above this cap.
- External daily-limit flag: True. When this flag is injected as enabled, include the transfer amount when evaluating the customer's external daily transfer capacity.

See "Transfer Types Fees And Limits Guide" when comparing this option against other transfer products.

## Cutoff and Delivery
A Same-day ACH transfer must be submitted by 14:00 to receive 0 business-day delivery. If a customer asks after the cutoff, quote the next eligible processing path rather than promising same-day completion. See "Transfer Cutoff And Delivery Policy" for business-day handling and cutoff interpretation.
title: Same-Day ACH Transfer Terms
